positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain range at dawn. The mountains should feature crisp, clean silhouettes of jagged peaks and gentle slopes. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and muted teal. The foreground can include stylized abstract elements like glowing nebula clouds or wisps of ethereal smoke to provide contrast. The style should be a blend of Pacific Northwest woodcut art and modern Nordic graphic design, emphasizing strong linework, negative space, and geometric balance. Central composition, perfect for textile printing. Conceptually titled 'Ascension'.
negative: blur, sketch, photorealistic, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logos, trademarks, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, noise, gradient fade, gradient coloring
